evals.prompt: How should I build API URLs in iOS?
evals.expected_output: Use URLComponents and URLQueryItem to build URLs safely. Never use string interpolation for URL parameters.

evals.prompt: How do I handle authentication tokens in iOS networking?
evals.expected_output: Use a RequestInterceptor to inject Authorization: Bearer token on all requests. On 401, use onRetry to call refreshToken() and retry the request.

evals.prompt: What networking anti-patterns should I avoid in iOS?
evals.expected_output: No UI updates from background thread — use @MainActor. No manual JSONSerialization — use Codable. Always set a reasonable timeoutInterval.

should_not_trigger: Set up a basic iOS project from scratch
How do I install iOS dependencies?
Configure CI/CD for an unrelated platform
